description: Best-effort merged lineup for US, Canada, and the UK using the existing Dispatcharr Lineuparr JSON files plus additional provider channel lists found online. Categories are preserved in JSON format, channels are merged and globally deduped by normalized name, and the first match in source priority order keeps its number.
source: Merged from Dispatcharr Lineuparr repo + Bell Fibe TV + Virgin Media Channel Guide + DIRECTV Satellite Channel Lineup + Optimum Entertainment TV
notes: Source priority for channel number retention: existing merged CA/US/UK Lineuparr file, then Virgin Media Aug 2024, Optimum Entertainment TV Jul 2024, Bell Fibe TV Feb 2026, and DIRECTV Satellite Channel Lineup Jan 2026. Dedupe normalizes case and removes HD/UHD/4K markers but keeps distinct East/West and +1 variants when present. This is comprehensive but not exhaustive across every provider/region/ZIP/postcode.

Sports.name: Bases Loaded / Buzzer Beater / Goal Line

Regional Sports.name: Regional Sports Networks (market-based)
Regional Sports.notes: Varies by ZIP code. Hopper receivers only. All other receivers 409-437.
